video_id: 女生必看！不同年龄段女生给女孩的建议.mp4.mp3
transcript: What piece of advice would you give to all women? That they need to be nice to people. Hug people and treat them nice. Be yourself. Always be yourself. Never knock it till you try it. Be strong, stay happy, and don't let anyone hurt you. Be proud you're a girl. You're beautiful. Be confident with who you are, no matter what you look like. Don't think that men are above you. Happiness is your own choice, and you have the ability to create your own happiness. Just because one person hurts you does not mean everyone will. Never give up on your dreams. Don't let anybody treat you like you're less than equal. Love yourself. Be independent and love yourself. Never give up. Be confident and stay true to yourself. Don't let anybody tell you that you're not good enough. Love yourself. You are enough and you don't need the validation of somebody else to prove that to you. We got this. We got it. We just we just got it. Try to be around people who genuinely love you. Love each other. Raise each other up. Give more hugs. Receive more hugs. Be brave be brave be fearless don't be afraid to take up space in the world to push your limits never be afraid to chase your dreams learn how to become your own best friend do you and be you and be shameless while you do it you have to love yourself before anyone else can love you don't be afraid to be every facet of yourself be the most authentic you have more confidence to love themselves get to know yourself accept yourself be you be the biggest baddest you you can be quit caring about other people's opinions only do what makes you happy be confident Try not to be perfect. Love yourself and that's a major and minor things. Never let anybody devalue you or intimidate you out of what you know is right. Believe in yourself. Be strong. You are beautiful. Respect yourself. Respect yourself and to always be true to yourself. Try to be self-reliant. Follow your gut. Stay true to yourself. Focus on your goals. Stay weird if you're weird. Do unto others as you would have them do unto you. Be yourself. Enjoy the ride because you only go around once. Be yourself and be proud of it. Say yes before you say no. Be 100% prepared and be flexible when the day doesn't turn out as you plan because it never does always be present respect yourself be strong be positive don't take everything so personally be yourself be authentic don't worry about what other people think of you hold on to your heart and keep it dear because that's the most precious thing you have. Be happy who you are and how God made you. Don't take any bullshit. Be independent. Be smart. Follow your dreams. Don't let anybody else define you. Listen to yourself. Be confident. Be strong. Know your worth. Be yourself and don't rely on your looks. Take good care of yourselves. To not be afraid to do what it is you want to do in life. Be yourself and not be intimidated. Know you're much stronger than you think you are. Embrace independence. Enjoy your youth. Follow your heart. Listen to yourself. To know themselves.
